channel.title: Posts on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Markdown
item.description:
Learning the Language of Information

Topic: Markdown, LaTeX, and Digital Documentation

This was also very new topic for me Markdown, LaTeX, and Digital Documentation .I never have used tools like Markdown, Zettlr, or Hugo.  I’ve only used the Google Docs Microsoft Word Notepad Wordpad for typing. So in the beginning , in the lab I felt a little lost but later It becomes so interesting for typing in zettler using markdown.

item.title: Dikw
item.description:
Thinking About the DIKW Pyramid

Data Information Knowledge Wisdom (DIKW) Model

Before this course, I had’nt learned or heard about the Data Information Knowledge Wisdom (DIKW) pyramid. So when I first saw it in class, I was thinking that we will learn about the data organizing. I thought it was just a simple way to explain how data will become useful. Then when i saw it in class , The diagram pyramid made it look very clear. First we have data, then it becomes information, then knowledge, and finally wisdom. And at that time, it felt like I’m getting a clear idea.

item.title: Khushi Blog
item.description:
INTRODUCTION

I am Khushi Kumari. I am from Jehanabad Bihar. I had PCMB in my class 12th Board. I got selected in Azim Premji University in 2025 and here I am pursuing my BSc Hons Degree in Information Sciences. I chose this degree Because I am interested in IT sector and further I also want to pursue masters in Computer Sciences.

Lab 1

In Lab 1 I get to know about Wiki and markdown. Me with my group members get the overview of Wiki and did the markdown tutorial. We also installed zettler and typed mathematical expressions in Zettler.
